_comment: Metadata for the docs/ manual. The last_synced_commit is the commit at which docs/ was last verified against the implementation; the sync-docs skill (.claude/skills/sync-docs/SKILL.md) diffs HEAD against it and updates this file. Committed to git on purpose so the baseline persists across sessions and machines. A dotfile + .json so a future docs website does not render it as a page.
note: No doc edits needed: the three user-facing features in range were already documented in their feature PRs. (1) Open In — Automatic project-aware app selection + many added apps (CLion, GoLand, PhpStorm, Rider, RubyMine, Sublime Text, Tower, iTerm2) and the 'Automatic' clear-pin menu entry (#439) are covered in repositories-and-worktrees.md, verified against OpenWorktreeAction.swift / WorktreeProjectKind.swift. (2) Per-repo GitHub identity override + multi-account GitHub settings tab (#437) are covered in github-pull-requests.md and settings-fields.md (githubAccountOverride row), verified against RepositorySettings.swift / GithubSettingsView.swift. (3) Working-state hold generalized to all agents at ~3s + viewer-overlay last-state handling (#438) are covered generically in agent-detection.md, verified against PaneAgentState.swift. Remaining changes are internal wiring (gh client/reducers/coordinators) and a tooltip tweak. Baseline bump only.
